$comment: Machine-readable projection of docs/design/DESIGN-SYSTEM.md. DESIGN-SYSTEM.md is the human source of truth; this file is the agent/harness-facing contract. Concrete token VALUES are populated by F-028 via tweakcn export.
name: tessera-design-system

tokens.valuesImplementedIn: apps/web/app/globals.css (F-028) — a neutral OKLCH base; refine per brand via tweakcn without touching components.
tokens.rule: Components reference semantic CSS variables only — never hardcode color/spacing/radius/shadow.

color.contrast: WCAG 2.1 AA — body >= 4.5:1, large/non-text UI >= 3:1; EXECUTABLE: apps/web/tests/contrast.test.ts asserts the registered pairings across all 4 themes x 2 modes in the test gate (DESIGN-SYSTEM 8.1, rule .harness/rules/frontend/contrast.md, skill contrast-checker)

families.sans: per theme via --font-sans (monkai Geist, amber Inter, claude system stacks, notebook Architects Daughter)
families.mono: per theme via --font-mono (monkai Geist Mono, amber JetBrains Mono, notebook Fira Code) — code/IDs/provenance

typography.loading: next/font self-hosted; theme fonts preload:false (fetched only when the active theme uses them)

catalog: monkai (default — the efferd set; classless :root/.dark ARE monkai, byte-stable)
themes.mechanism: two orthogonal axes on <html>: mode = .dark class (next-themes, system supported); theme = data-theme attribute persisted in localStorage('tessera.theme') with a pre-paint script (no FOUC). Vendored token blocks live in apps/web/app/themes.css as [data-theme='X'] / [data-theme='X'].dark — full role set + chart + sidebar + radius + shadows + fonts. NEVER shadcn-add a theme (clobbers :root). Never branch on theme/mode in components — tokens only.
themes.propagation: appearance changes ripple radially from the invoking control via startViewTransition + clip-path circle (apps/web/lib/theme.tsx); instant under prefers-reduced-motion or a missing View Transitions API

appShell.sidebar: collapsible, sidebar-* tokens, collapses to a drawer on mobile

illustrations.form: server-rendered SVG on a fixed grid; dashboard tokens only (theme-true in all 4 themes x 2 modes); CSS-only motion (transform/opacity) with a prefers-reduced-motion designed still scene; decorative = aria-hidden; cheap interactivity only (hover/pointer, no canvas/WebGL, no animation libs)
illustrations.honesty: arts depict product truths (pipeline, effect propagation, retrieval signals, memory strata, ledger) — never fake charts/metrics/data
illustrations.slots: EmptyState/ErrorState expose optional art/mascot props; text remains the information carrier

mascot.binding: --mascot-* (tile/tile-warm/tile-deep/heart/sheen/ink) bound PER THEME in apps/web/app/globals.css; heart = each theme's warm accent (monkai: the one warm moment on non-data surfaces)
mascot.budget: same as illustrations.usageBudget — never headers/nav/data views; reduced-motion still poses are part of the a11y gate

motion.reducedMotion: every animation has a prefers-reduced-motion fallback
motion.principle: communicate state and causality, never decoration

checklist: loading skeleton / empty / error states on every async surface
drag-and-drop / context menus where they aid the task

checks: AA contrast (executable — apps/web/tests/contrast.test.ts across 4 themes x 2 modes)

provenanceSurfaces.principle: any view that shows context shows sources/scores/why-included
provenanceSurfaces.flagship: Context Package inspector (FR-44): stages, candidates, scores, drops, per-fragment why-included

astryx.note: Meta StyleX design system, agent-ready (MCP/manifest); re-evaluate once matured.
